Subtitle: by AnkleBreaker Studio
AboutText: AnkleBreaker Studio is a French game development team based near Paris, working remotely and fueled by a shared passion for survival, competitive, and RTS games. We're currently working on our upcoming title, Mithrall. We built the Unity MCP to bridge AI assistants directly into the Unity Editor -giving you access to 200+ tools that let AI read, modify, and interact with your scenes, assets, scripts, and more.
LongHaulText: This MCP will be actively maintained by our team for as long as we develop games on Unity -and that should be a very long time! We use it every day ourselves, so you can count on it staying up-to-date and reliable.
ReviewText: If you find the Unity MCP useful, we'd really appreciate a star or review on GitHub. It helps other developers discover the project and motivates us to keep building awesome tools for the community.

CustomSections.Heading: Premium MCP Library
CustomSections.Body: Want even more power? We offer a curated library of premium MCPs for just $15/month through GitHub Sponsors (Backer tier). You'll get access to our Discord MCP, Jira MCP, Git & GitHub MCP, LinkedIn MCP, Plastic SCM MCP, and more as we keep building.

CustomSections.Heading: Support open source
CustomSections.Body: Even if premium MCPs aren't for you, your support means the world to us. A star, a kind word, a bug report, a contribution -every little bit encourages us to keep making more tools and giving back to the community. Thank you for being part of this journey with us!
